hero.title: Parish photo albums
hero.lede: Add albums in the CMS and each album will display as a rotating image set on this page.

intro.title: A simple album layout for parish life
intro.body: This placeholder gallery shows the structure only. Replace the example albums with real parish photographs.

albums.title: Welcome Day
albums.body: Use one album for each event or celebration. The priest or administrator can add more albums in the CMS.
albums.note: Replace this album with real parish photographs.

albums.title: Parish Life
albums.body: This second example album shows how a separate event or ministry can have its own rotating image set.
albums.note: Add captions and alt text whenever new images are uploaded.

cards.title: Add a new album in the CMS
paragraphs: The gallery collection lets the parish create a new album, add multiple photographs, and update captions without touching the layout.

cards.title: Use good captions and alt text
paragraphs: Add a short caption for each photograph and a clear alt text description so the gallery stays accessible and easy to manage.
